title: Merchant enters in urgent motion
goal: Establish the merchant and donkey immediately in forward motion with oversized urgency from the first frame.

title: Satchel-clutching street push
goal: End the opening shot with the merchant more compressed and intent, reinforcing his panic while the donkey stays steady.

title: Entering the market crush
goal: Show the pair plunging into a dense market so ordinary city life becomes an obstacle course.

title: Chaos threaded cleanly
goal: Land the escalation with the merchant forcing through tight market clutter while the donkey remains improbably calm.

title: Approaching the Duomo works
goal: Widen the world and introduce the under-construction Duomo as a grand historical backdrop.

title: Tiny rider, monumental city
goal: End with architecture briefly dwarfing the merchant so the errand feels absurdly important.

title: Panic tightening
goal: Shift to a tighter, more frantic framing centered on the merchant's face, posture, and grip on the satchel.

title: Seconds from disaster
goal: Peak the false suspense by making the merchant look as though he is about to miss an irreversible deadline.

title: Sharp stop at the doorway
goal: Show the donkey pulling up at a modest but consequential-looking doorway as the merchant begins to dismount badly.

title: Bursting through the door
goal: Hit the climax of the false premise with the merchant lunging through the entrance in total loss of dignity.

title: Quiet library reveal
goal: Hard-reset the energy inside a calm Renaissance library and reveal the merchant breathless at the desk.

title: Overdue book presented
goal: Clarify the joke by showing the overdue book and the librarian's dry, devastating lack of alarm.

title: Withering look holds
goal: Keep the librarian's judgment foregrounded while introducing the outside window as setup for the final gag.

title: Donkey eating flowers button
goal: Land the last comic indignity with the donkey visible outside the window calmly eating flowers while the interior tension hangs.
